title: The Ninth Nugget
desc: A giant gold nugget vanishes from the ranch safe — and the kids must rope the real crook. ⛏️

q.en: Where do Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose go for their vacation?
q.zh: Dink、Josh 和 Ruth Rose 去哪里度假？

options.en: A dude ranch in Bozeman, Montana
options.zh: 蒙大拿州博兹曼的一个度假牧场

options.en: A summer camp in Connecticut according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 康涅狄格州的夏令营（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A friend gives them a trip to the Western Wheat dude ranch in Bozeman, Montana.
explain.zh: 一位朋友送他们去蒙大拿州博兹曼的 Western Wheat 度假牧场玩。

q.en: Who picks the kids up at the airport?
q.zh: 是谁去机场接孩子们的？

options.en: Pa Wheat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Pa Wheat（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Jud Wheat, the son of the ranch owners, drives a station wagon to pick them up and is late.
explain.zh: 牧场主的儿子 Jud Wheat 开着旅行车去接他们，还迟到了。

q.en: What does Josh find in the stream that is about the size of a potato?
q.zh: Josh 在溪水里发现了什么，大小差不多像一颗土豆？

options.en: A silver coin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一枚银币（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Josh falls into the stream and comes up holding a huge gold nugget as big as his hand.
explain.zh: Josh 掉进溪里，爬起来时手里握着一块和他手掌一样大的金块。

q.en: Why does Ed Getz pretend to hurt his ankle?
q.zh: Ed Getz 为什么要假装脚踝受伤？

options.en: Because he was afraid of bears
To stay behind at the ranch so he can rob the safe
options.zh: 为了留在牧场，好去撬保险箱

options.en: He really fell off his horse
options.zh: 他真的从马上摔下来了

options.en: To get attention from Fiona according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了引起 Fiona 的注意（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Once he knew the gold was in the safe, Ed faked an injury so he could stay behind and steal it.
explain.zh: Ed 一知道金块放进保险箱，就假装受伤留在牧场，好去偷它。

q.en: What is the robber wearing when he ties people up and opens the safe?
q.zh: 小偷把人绑起来、撬开保险箱时穿着什么？

options.en: A bear costume according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 熊的服装（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A black hood and black clothing

explain.en: Lulu describes the robber as dressed all in black with a black hood over his face and gloves on his hands.
explain.zh: Lulu 说小偷全身黑衣、脸上罩着黑色头套，手上还戴着手套。

q.en: Who actually steals Josh's gold nugget?
q.zh: 到底是谁偷走了 Josh 的金块？

explain.en: Ed Getz is the thief; he faked his injury, tied up the others, and cracked the safe himself.
explain.zh: Ed Getz 才是小偷；他假装受伤，把其他人绑起来，自己撬开了保险箱。

q.en: What tool does the thief use to figure out the safe's combination?
q.zh: 小偷用什么工具破解了保险箱的密码？

explain.en: Dink spots a stethoscope in Ed's cabin; he likely used it to listen to the safe's lock and learn the combination.
explain.zh: Dink 在 Ed 的 cabin 里看到听诊器；他很可能用它听保险箱锁的声音来破解密码。

q.en: How do the kids discover that Ed is the thief?
q.zh: 孩子们是怎么发现 Ed 就是小偷的？

options.en: They watch him unwrap his fake bandage and the nugget falls out of his sock
options.zh: 他们看见他拆掉假绷带，金块从袜子里掉了出来

options.en: Thumbs tells them according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: Thumbs 告诉他们的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Through Ed's window, the kids see him remove the bandage and shake his sock, and the gold nugget tumbles out.
explain.zh: 孩子们透过 Ed 的窗户，看见他拆掉绷带、倒空袜子，金块从里面掉了出来。

q.zh: Ed 最终是怎么被抓住的？

options.en: Josh lassoes him from the cabin roof with his rope
options.zh: Josh 在屋顶用套索把他套住

options.en: He trips and falls into the pond according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他绊倒掉进池塘（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He is arrested at the airport

explain.en: As Ed tries to leave, Josh drops a rope loop from the roof onto Ed's shoulders and ties him up until the adults arrive.
explain.zh: Ed 想溜走时，Josh 从屋顶抛下绳套套住他的肩膀，把他绑住，直到大人们赶来。

q.en: What does Josh decide to do with the gold nugget at the end?
q.zh: 最后 Josh 决定怎么处理这块金块？

options.en: Hide it in the safe again
options.zh: 再次把它藏在保险箱里

options.en: Sell it and keep the money for a new car according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 卖掉它，把钱留着买新车（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Leave it at the ranch so the money can help save the ranch
options.zh: 把它留在牧场，用这笔钱拯救牧场

explain.en: Josh gives the gold to Jud to sell, asking that the money be used to save the struggling Wheat Ranch.
explain.zh: Josh 把金块交给 Jud 去卖，请他用这笔钱来拯救经营困难的 Wheat 牧场。
